titleStmt.title: SII 17.195: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 195. (A.R. No. 174 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This record commences with Tirumagaḷ pōla, etc., the praśasti of the king.

It records the gift of sheep for a perpetual lamp to God Śrī Mūlasthānam-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Tiruvakkarai, in Tribhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Vēḷāḷaṉ Māmbākkam-uḍaiyāṉ Śāttaṉ Alai, a resident of Pandamaṅgalam, the northern hamlet of Tiruvakkarai.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉak koḷḷa
kkān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷamppāṭiyum taṭikaiyāṭi
yum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Ila
ṭṭa pāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāl koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyūḷ
ḷellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe(y)e ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovi rājarāja
kesaripaṉmarāṉa śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇ
ṭalattu brahmadeyam śrī tiribhuvaṉamahādevicaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvakkarai śrīmūla sthāna
muṭaiya mahādevaṟku Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākaip pan=tamaṅkalattirukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ māmpākka muṭaiyāṉ
cāttaṉ Ālai vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉāl Āṭu toṇṇūṟum cāvāmuvāppe
rāṭu Ivāṭu toṇṇūṟum meyttu ney Āṭṭak kaṭavāṉ Ippantamaṅkalattirukku maṉ
ṟāṭi pāppaṉ mātevaṉ Eccilum mātevaṉ nallānum Ivviruvarum Idhanmam can=tirāti
ttaṉvū ṉiṟpatu Idhanmam rakṣittāṉ śrīpātam Eṉ talai melaṉa .
Digital edition of SII 17.195 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
